title: Glove Word Embeddings (1 year)
content:
# Glove Word Embeddings (1 year)

Authors: Pair, Emma
Published: 2021-12-08T02:06:16Z
Subjects: Computer and Information Science, Social Sciences
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/05OJVF

These are GloVe word embeddings created from article text for each year (e.g. 1998, 1999) from the Daily Nation, a Kenyan newspaper, and the corresponding vocabulary files.

Citation: Pair, Emma, 2021, "Glove Word Embeddings (1 year)", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/05OJVF, Harvard Dataverse, V1
